goal: Publish a canonical, executable governance model for inference-window decay, commit-time standing, irreversibility-adjusted assurance, governed recovery, and lifecycle placement.

concept_boundaries.inference_window_governance: Operational evaluation of one proposed transition at commitment.
concept_boundaries.governed_action_lifecycle: Placement of commit-time evaluation within proposal, bounded execution, consequence observation, recovery, accountability, and reconstruction.
concept_boundaries.iict: Theorem candidate about architectural convergence under repeated admissibility optimization.

claims_boundary.function: Tests whether explicit evidence, authority, policy, scope, consequence, and recovery conditions satisfy the declared commit-time governance rule and documents where that evaluation belongs in the governed action lifecycle.

remaining_checks: Confirm the canonical validation job executes the validator and unit tests successfully.
Confirm the formalism, lifecycle, IICT, schema, worked cases, and status routes are publicly reachable.
Record the successful workflow run and public verification receipt before declaring activation complete.
